_publications._publicationTitle: Functional Assays Combined with Pre-mRNA-Splicing Analysis Improve Variant Classification and Diagnostics for Individuals with Neurofibromatosis Type 1 and Legius Syndrome.

_contextSnippet: We used an anti-FLAG affinity matrix to coimmunoprecipitate (coIP) the WT NF p.2069myc and p.420ins10myc proteins together with coexpressed WT FLAG-SPRED1
details: Successfully used in coimmunoprecipitation experiments to pull down FLAG-SPRED1 and assess NF-SPRED1 interactions
